onboarding.title: What is your restaurant called?
onboarding.description: We’ll use the name to create your account and the first address for your restaurant.
onboarding.helper: We’ll add the menu and the rest of the setup a bit later.
onboarding.error: We couldn’t create your restaurant. Please try again.
onboarding.slugError: We couldn’t reserve a unique address. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to HaresvaMi.
welcome.subtitle: A few steps before the first piece of feedback comes in.

menu.descTodo: So the AI can match dishes from printed receipts.
menu.descDone: {count, plural, one {# dish} other {# dishes}} · AI is learning your abbreviations.

tablet.descTodo: The tablet will scan your customers’ receipts at the table.

feedback.title: First feedback
feedback.descLocked: We’ll tick this automatically the moment the first rating arrives.
feedback.descWaiting: Everything is ready. The moment a customer rates a dish, you’ll see it here.

tier.title: Free plan
tier.blurb: The trial unlocks AI receipt scanning and unlimited feedback for 14 days.

tutorial.title: How HaresvaMi works
tutorial.subtitle: The process, without jargon.
tutorial.step3: You watch the results come in live.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: This is where you’ll see every rating your customers leave, dish by dish.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: This is where you’ll manage your dishes and receipt abbreviations.

tablet.title: Tablet
tablet.description: This is where you’ll pair and monitor the in-restaurant tablet.

team.title: Team
team.description: This is where you’ll invite staff and assign their roles.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: This is where you’ll manage restaurant settings and your plan.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is where you’ll manage your personal details and access.

menu.title: Menu
menu.emptyDesc: Use our AI to scan your menu from a photo, or enter items manually.
menu.magicImportDesc: Upload a photo of your physical menu. We extract items automatically.
menu.manualDesc: Enter your products in a table.
menu.uploading: Reading menu... This might take a minute.
menu.reviewDesc: Review the extracted items and correct any mistakes before saving.

errors.upload: Failed to read menu. Try a clearer photo.
